name: AREV NanoTec Brands Inc.
summary: AREV NanoTec Brands Inc., an integrated cannabis company, produces and delivers functional compounds and ingredients in Canada. The company's ingredients and formulations are used in products that are targeted for sale in the natural health, medical, functional food, nutraceutical, sports nutrition, and bioceutical markets. Its products addresses the areas of health, which include anxiety, pain management, insomnia, central nervous system, and disorders and libido. The company was formerly known as AREV Brands International Ltd. and changed its name to AREV NanoTec Brands Inc. in March 2020. AREV NanoTec Brands Inc. was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Coquitlam, Canada.
